<!-- What does this PR change, and why? -->

## Related issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Security fix (also note implications below)

## Component(s)

## Security implications

<!-- Required for circuit, pool program, relayer money path, or x402 spend-guard
changes. State the threat model and what your change does to it. Write "none" if
genuinely not applicable. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` and `npm test` pass for affected TS packages
- [ ] `cargo check` passes for affected Rust programs
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the change (required for security-sensitive code)
- [ ] Updated docs / `CHANGELOG.md` if behavior changed
- [ ] No secrets, keypairs, or `.env` files committed
